channel.title: Openbsd on ivomarino.com
channel.description: Recent content in Openbsd on ivomarino.com

item.title: Production Security Updates Without Downtime: Debian, FreeBSD, and OpenBSD
item.description: Security patches can’t wait, but unplanned reboots break production. The update runbook for Debian, FreeBSD, and OpenBSD — with real scripts, hold patterns, and a zero-downtime cluster update sequence.

item.title: OpenBSD CARP Firewalls in Front of a Private Kubernetes Cluster
item.description: We run two OpenBSD firewalls in CARP HA mode in front of a private Kubernetes cluster. Sub-second failover, full state sync, and pf rules that load-balance across worker nodes.
